## oak application sla

Display an available SLA file as formatted JSON

### Synopsis

Display the contents of an SLA file.

SLA file resolution follows the same order as 'app create'.

```
oak application sla [sla-name] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for sla
```
